ci_support_linux_64_.yaml:
channel_sources:
- conda-forge
channel_targets:
- conda-forge main
docker_image:
- quay.io/condaforge/linux-anvil-x86_64:alma9
python_min:
- '3.10'

about.description:
This app provides a mechanism to logout inactive authenticated users.
An inactive browser should be logged out automatically if the user left
his workstation, to protect sensitive data that may be displayed in the
browser. It may be useful for CRMs, intranets, and such projects.
about.summary: A Django app that provides a mechanism to logout inactive authenticated users.

about.description:
This app provides a mechanism to logout inactive authenticated users.
An inactive browser should be logged out automatically if the user left
his workstation, to protect sensitive data that may be displayed in the
browser. It may be useful for CRMs, intranets, and such projects.
about.summary: A Django app that provides a mechanism to logout inactive authenticated users.

name: django-session-security
raw_meta_yaml:
{% set name = "django-session-security" %}
{% set version = "2.6.8" %}

package:
  name: {{ name|lower }}
  version: {{ version }}

source:
  url: https://pypi.org/packages/source/{{ name[0] }}/{{ name }}/{{ name | replace('-', '_') }}-{{ version }}.tar.gz
  sha256: f8949d021eee5e237385413a1173bb90c3bd80ce2d56e412a5644608de815109

build:
  noarch: python
  number: 0
  script: {{ PYTHON }} -m pip install . -vv

requirements:
  host:
    - python {{ python_min }}
    - pip
    - setuptools
  run:
    - python >={{ python_min }}
    - django >=2.2

test:
  imports:
    - session_security
  requires:
    - pip
    - python {{ python_min }}
  commands:
    - pip check

about:
  home: https://github.com/yourlabs/django-session-security
  license: MIT
  license_family: MIT
  license_file: LICENSE.txt
  summary: A Django app that provides a mechanism to logout inactive authenticated users.
  description: |
    This app provides a mechanism to logout inactive authenticated users.
    An inactive browser should be logged out automatically if the user left
    his workstation, to protect sensitive data that may be displayed in the
    browser. It may be useful for CRMs, intranets, and such projects.
  doc_url: https://github.com/yourlabs/django-session-security
  dev_url: https://github.com/yourlabs/django-session-security

extra:
  recipe-maintainers:
    - swainn
